description: Create a complete procedural environment in Houdini. Build a mountain terrain using HeightField nodes with thermal and hydraulic erosion applied. Scatter at least 50 rock instances across the terrain surface using Copy to Points with randomized scale and orientation. Add an HDRI environment light for natural outdoor illumination. Set up a camera framing the terrain and render a 1920x1080 image to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/renders/terrain_render.png'. Save the final scene as '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/terrain_environment.hipnc'.
